breakdown: Ports CodeRabbit fallback logic to Skeptic Gates workflows, adding error handling with pipefail guards and exit code checking. The changes add a secondary approval path when CodeRabbit doesn't leave a formal review (checks status + bot comment). Good variable naming and comments explaining the fallback rationale.
key_changes: Added CR fallback logic in skeptic-gate.yml Gate-3: checks formal review first, then status + comment as fallback
Added set +e -o pipefail guards around gh api calls to capture and handle failures
Expanded user matching from 'coderabbitai[bot]' to include 'coderabbitai'
Added same fallback logic to skeptic-cron.yml for consistency
Changed approval regex from strict '^(?m)^\s*\[approve\]\s*$' to simpler '\[approve\]'
